title: 웹 UI·UX 리뷰·자문가
estimatedCost: 결정론 도구 없음(전부 호스트 모델 토큰). 사용자가 선택한 모델·플랜과 리뷰 분량에 비례하며, URL fetch·스크린샷 해석은 호스트 런타임 능력에 따라 추가 토큰이 든다.
includes: review intake / landing-page-review / evidence-based-audit / feedback-handoff-prompt skills
requirements: 코딩 에이전트 런타임(Claude Code, Codex 등) 또는 LLM 채팅. 별도 설치·빌드 불필요.
disclaimer: Users run this package with their own environment, model account, and budget. This worker reviews and advises only; it does not implement screens. Review findings are evidence-based signals, not a substitute for real-user testing, and aesthetic trend judgments have a shelf life. Some workflow structures are adapted from github.com/MengTo/Skills (MIT, Meng To).
